purpose: Evidence for Validator-B hardening after review findings.

commands.summary: Syntax check passed after adding required-field parity.

Dry-run passed. Logged command shape uses only a short --prompt instruction plus --output-format json --sandbox; full review payload is not in argv. Gemini CLI --sandbox is a boolean enable flag, while this wrapper enforces read-only by rejecting other sandbox labels before spawn.

review_findings_addressed: Prompt payload no longer travels through argv.
Validator-B accepts only read-only sandbox label and enables Gemini CLI sandboxing with the boolean --sandbox flag.
Validator-B prompt embeds validator-result schema contract.
Total embedded context budget is enforced.
Validator-B independence guard checks refs, changed_files, and previous_failures for other-validator/Codex references.
Validator-A result validation now checks github_commit and tier_reclassification_reason.
Validator-B fixture validation is globbed instead of task-path hardcoded.
